originalTitle: The Strait of Hormuz is back under ‘full-conflict conditions’ — and energy markets are scrambling
summary: Oil prices surge as U.S. and Iran trade strikes; but even without further disruption, volatility appears here to stay for energy markets
content: Oil prices surge as U.S. and Iran trade strikes; but even without further disruption, volatility appears here to stay for energy markets
chineseTitle: 霍尔木兹海峡再次陷入“全面冲突”——能源市场陷入混乱
chineseSummary: 美国和伊朗贸易冲突导致油价飙升；但即使没有进一步的干扰，能源市场的波动似乎仍将持续
chineseContent: 美国和伊朗贸易冲突导致油价飙升；但即使没有进一步的干扰，能源市场的波动似乎仍将持续
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
